mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECIPE_ID, R.MEMBER_ID, R.TITLE, R.THUMBNAIL_URL, R.CREATED_AT, R.DESCRIPTION, R.COOKING_TIME, R.SERVINGS, R.DIFFICULTY, C.CATEGORY_NAME,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RECIPE_LIKE L WHERE L.RECIPE_ID = R.RECIPE_ID) AS LIKECOUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RECIPE_LIKE L2 WHERE L2.RECIPE_ID = R.RECIPE_ID AND L2.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AS LIKED,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RECIPE_BOOKMARK B2 WHERE B2.RECIPE_ID = R.RECIPE_ID AND B2.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AS BOOKMARKED
FROM RECIPE R LEFT JOIN RECIPE_CATEGORY C ON R.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND R.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND R.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY R.RECIPE_ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RECIPE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RECIPE ( RECIPE_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, COOKING_TIME, SERVINGS, DIFFICULTY, THUMBNAIL_URL ) VALUES ( #{recipeId}, #{memberId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{cookingTime}, #{servings}, #{difficulty}, #{thumbnailUrl} )
INSERT INTO RECIPE_BLOCK ( BLOCK_ID, RECIPE_ID, BLOCK_TYPE, CONTENT, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECIPE_BLOCK.NEXTVAL, #{recipeId}, #{blockType}, #{content}, #{sortOrder} )
INSERT INTO RECIPE_INGREDIENT ( INGREDIENT_ID, RECIPE_ID, NAME, AMOUNT ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECIPE_INGREDIENT.NEXTVAL, #{recipeId}, #{name}, #{amount} )
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECIPE_ID, R.MEMBER_ID, R.TITLE, R.DESCRIPTION, R.CREATED_AT, R.COOKING_TIME, R.DIFFICULTY, R.SERVINGS, R.THUMBNAIL_URL,
C.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RECIPE_LIKE L WHERE L.RECIPE_ID = R.RECIPE_ID) AS LIKECOUNT
FROM RECIPE R LEFT JOIN RECIPE_CATEGORY C ON R.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID
WHERE R.RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId}
SELECT BLOCK_ID, RECIPE_ID, BLOCK_TYPE, CONTENT, SORT_ORDER FROM RECIPE_BLOCK WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT INGREDIENT_ID, RECIPE_ID, NAME, AMOUNT FROM RECIPE_INGREDIENT WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} order by INGREDIENT_ID

SELECT CASE WHEN #{memberId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RECIPE_LIKE WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
CASE WHEN #{memberId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RECIPE_BOOKMARK WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked FROM DUAL
